comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

```
execv(/usr/bin/dnf-3) failed: No such file or directory
```
, like in #2323 , seem new. Probably not blocking the upstream release.
Per confirmation elsewhere (and compare https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5523 ), the `dnf-3` failures are not blocking here.
Is there a plan to cut a new patch release after this PR, assuming CVE-2024-3727 also affects skopeo?
Yes, we are working on that, and it should happen within the next few days.
